description:
Provides a unified handler for executing commands and transferring files
either locally or on a remote machine, driven by configuration settings.

classes.name: ExecutionResult
classes.docstring: A structured result from a command execution.

classes.name: JobSubmissionResult
classes.docstring: Result from a job submission, including a potential job ID.

classes.name: UploadResult
classes.docstring: Result from a file upload operation.

classes.name: DownloadResult
classes.docstring: Result from a file download operation.

classes.name: ExecutionHandler
classes.docstring: A simplified handler that executes commands generated by the Settings class.

methods.name: execute_command
methods.docstring: Executes a command either locally or remotely.

methods.name: submit_simulation_job
methods.docstring: Submits a simulation job using a specific command key from the Settings.

methods.name: post_process
methods.docstring: Runs a post-processing command obtained from Settings.

methods.name: upload_file
methods.docstring: Uploads a file. In local mode, this is a copy.

methods.name: download_file
methods.docstring: Downloads a file. In local mode, this is a copy.

methods.name: cleanup
methods.docstring: Runs a cleanup command (e.g., 'rm -rf') from Settings.

methods.name: upload_to_pc_localdata
methods.docstring: Uploads results by executing a command from Settings.

methods.name: _mkdir_p
methods.docstring:
Creates a directory and all its parents recursively on the remote server.
        This is a more robust implementation that handles nested creation.
